title: Evangelion in Super Robot Wars
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion in Super Robot Wars             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Tue Aug 01, 2006 9:02 pm For those of you who don't know about Super Robot Wars, it's an RPG/Strategy game developed by Banpresto, a division of Bandai. It features a vast amount of mecha, both licensed and unlicensed here in America. Some mecha include Gundam, Mazinger Z, Nadesico, RahXephon, Space Runaway Ideon, and of course Evangelion. Some of you may have not heard of it because it's not released in America, or any place out of Japan, due to frustrating licensing issues. We actually could have gotten them, but unfortunately ADV, who held the licenses to most of the anime at the time, asked for a shitload of money, and we ended up not getting it. Blame them. :P Fortunately, Atlus is releasing the SRW Original Generations GBA games. They don't feature any licensed mecha, but it still plays the same, and some of their original mecha are based of existing ones. Here are some clips I found around YouTube. They're pretty cool and fun to watch. All of the Evangelion Unit's attacks in Super Robot Wars MX. Even more SRW MX clips -- including Asuka vs. Mass Production Evas! (with some help from Shinji and even G Gundam characters!) The Evangelion Units in the recent SRW Alpha 3. "Eva-01, Lift Off" from SRW Alpha for the PS1. Berserk Eva-01 and RahXephon attack together. Berserk Eva-01 attacks Eva-00. Even more SRW@3 attacks. And my personal favorite: Eva-01 F-type - all attacks.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Aug 01, 2006 9:21 pm Actually Eva Units aren't robots are they?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 01, 2006 9:53 pm This recent thread might also be helpful: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1492

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Tue Aug 01, 2006 10:03 pm tinmeigut wrote: Actually Eva Units aren't robots are they?

Article: Evangelion in Super Robot Wars
[]: Evangelion in Super Robot Wars             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Tue Aug 01, 2006 9:02 pm For those of you who don't know about Super Robot Wars, it's an RPG/Strategy game developed by Banpresto, a division of Bandai. It features a vast amount of mecha, both licensed and unlicensed here in America. Some mecha include Gundam, Mazinger Z, Nadesico, RahXephon, Space Runaway Ideon, and of course Evangelion. Some of you may have not heard of it because it's not released in America, or any place out of Japan, due to frustrating licensing issues. We actually could have gotten them, but unfortunately ADV, who held the licenses to most of the anime at the time, asked for a shitload of money, and we ended up not getting it. Blame them. :P Fortunately, Atlus is releasing the SRW Original Generations GBA games. They don't feature any licensed mecha, but it still plays the same, and some of their original mecha are based of existing ones. Here are some clips I found around YouTube. They're pretty cool and fun to watch. All of the Evangelion Unit's attacks in Super Robot Wars MX. Even more SRW MX clips -- including Asuka vs. Mass Production Evas! (with some help from Shinji and even G Gundam characters!) The Evangelion Units in the recent SRW Alpha 3. "Eva-01, Lift Off" from SRW Alpha for the PS1. Berserk Eva-01 and RahXephon attack together. Berserk Eva-01 attacks Eva-00. Even more SRW@3 attacks. And my personal favorite: Eva-01 F-type - all attacks.
